MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk:P. Dias, CSR: June Leathely.
Matter continued from Jan. 19, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for counsel to obtain information of the Bank for the money to be deposited, and to submit an Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account.
Ivo Labar, Esq. for Petitioner: Gini Walusiak, as Guardian at litem for: Megan Walusiak and Katherine Walusiak, minor Claimants. Appearance of Petitioner is waived.
On the basis of evidence received, Each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved. No Fees or Costs.
A net balance of $5,000.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Lake Forest Bank & Trust, Co., 810 S. Waukegan Road, Lake Forest, IL 60045. No withdrawals shall be made without a court order or until the minors reach the age of 18 years.
